document_filename: Bijlage 2 - Brede Businesscase Nieuw Legmeer 2024 bij collegevoorstel Businesscase Nieuw Legmeer 2024.pdf

narrative_constraints.statement: The multi-year financial overview for Nieuw Legmeer and related matters (2024–2031+) shows total capital and financing costs rising from €145k (2024) to €6,750k (2031 onwards), driven by land exploitation shortfall, relocation of the werf, primary school, VO-school, intersections/cycling tunnels, and financing charges.

reasons: Clearly stated financial table with years 2024–2031+. Document type is 'other' (business case/toelichting), not a binding regels document, so confidence capped accordingly.
Values are unambiguous in the table but represent financial planning figures, not spatial/planning rules.

narrative_constraints.statement: From 2031 onwards, the addition of a VO-school causes a structural deterioration of the financial picture for Nieuw Legmeer.

provenance.document: Bijlage 2 - Brede Businesscase Nieuw Legmeer 2024 bij collegevoorstel Businesscase Nieuw Legmeer 2024.pdf
provenance.quoted_text: Door toevoeging van de VO-school ontstaat vanaf 2031 een verslechtering van het structureel beeld.

reasons: Directly and clearly stated in the introductory paragraph of the page.
Document is a business case (informative), not a binding regels document.

programme_hints: Nieuw Legmeer programme includes: relocation of a municipal works yard (werf), a primary school (basisschool), a secondary school (VO-school), intersections and cycling tunnels (kruispunten/fietstunnels).
Land exploitation shortfall (tekort op de grondexploitatie) of €7,200k is provisioned in 2025.
VO-school capital costs (kapitaallasten) of €980k appear from 2031 onwards.
Basisschool preparation costs: €600k (2029) and €1,100k (2030); capital costs €940k from 2031.
urban_intent_passages: In hoofdstuk 4.2.4 Nieuw Legmeer van de Perspectiefnota 2025 (blz. 21/22) wordt inzicht gegeven in de financiële mutaties Legmeer t/m 2030. Door toevoeging van de VO-school ontstaat vanaf 2031 een verslechtering van het structureel beeld.
